titleStmt.title: SII 22.541: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 541. (A.R. No. 541 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, PUṄGANŪR Sōmēśvarasvāmi temple-On a slab set up in the courtyard Rājakēsari Vīrarājēndradēva, 4th year (A.D. 1060)

summary.p: The inscription opens with a few birudas of the king in Sanskrit after which it gives the introduction Vīramētuṇaiyāgavum, etc. It registers a grant of 2800 kuḻi of wet land and 1400 kuḻi of dry land under the name Parahita-viḷāgam for the various requirements of worship and offerings to the images of Sōmāskanda called Vijayarājaviṭaṅka and of Naṭarāja called Śrīkaraṇa-viṭaṅka which had been consecrated in the temple of Tirukkoḷḷīśvaram-uḍaiya-mahādēva at Kuṅganūr alias Vaḷavanārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puli-nāḍu a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam by Śrīkaṇṭaṉ Rudramūrtti alias Bhūpālaśikhāmaṇi-Viḻupparaiyaṉ, a native of Śiṟuvēḷūr in Panaiyūr-nāḍu a division of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāḍu in Śōḻa-maṇḍalam. The sabhā of the place made a detailed apportionment of paddy for these several items of expenditure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sakalabhuvanāśraya śrīmedinī valla
bha mahārājādhirāja parameśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravi
kulatilaka coḷakulaśekhara pāṇḍyakulān=taka Āha
vamalla kulakāla Āhavamallanai mummaṭiven kaṇṭa rāja śe
khara rājāśraya viracoḷa karikālacoḷa śrīvirarājendṛ
deva virametuṇaiyākavu ntiyākameyaṇiyākavuñ
ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu kūṭal caṅkamattāha
vamallaṉai Añcuvittu maṟṟavan ceyvikkalaṉaiyu
ñ ciṅkaṇaṉaiyu muṭaipuṟaṅ kaṇṭu maṟṟavar māteviya
roṭum vastuvāhanamuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷi vijaiya
ciṅkācanattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷi
ṉa kovirājakeśarivanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājendra de
vaṟku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭala
ttup paṭuvūrkoṭṭattup perumpāṇappāṭip puli
nāṭṭuk kuṅkanūrāṉa vaḷavanārāyaṇac caruppetimaṅ
kalattut tirukkoḷḷiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar ko
yilil coḻamaṇṭalattu kṣatṛyacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭ
ṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān cikaṇṭan Uru
ttiramurittiyāna pūpālacikāmaṇi viḻupparaiyan Eḻunta
ruḷuvitta Umāskāta sahita tirumeni vijayarājaviṭa
ṅkarkkum meṟpaṭiyān pradiṣṭai ceyvittat tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyār śrīkaraṇa viṭaṅkarkkum pirāṭṭiyārkkum niva
ntañ ceyvitta Ivvūrp parahitaviḷāka Eṟṟūr Ellai
kku meṟkum yakṣiyālattin paḷḷattukku vaṭakkum meṟ
ku Ellāntikku vayal Uṭpaṭa nirnilattukkuk kiḻakkum va
ṭak koḻuṅkai meṭṭukkut teṟkumāka naṭuvu patineṇ cā
ṇ kolāl nirnilam Iraṇṭāyirat teṇṇūṟum kol
lai Āyirattu nānūṟumāka nālāyirattirunūṟu kuḻiyāl nā
[vacāna mellūr ?] nellukku meṟpaṭiyūr sabhaiyom niva
ntañ ceyta paricāvatu san=ti munṟukku Arici Aṟunāḻikku ne
l kuṟuṇiyeḻu nāḻiyum san=timunṟukkuk kaṟiyamutāṟu meṟpa
ṭikku neyyamutāḻākke Iruceviṭaraiyu meṟpaṭikkut ta
yiramutu nāḻiyuriyu meṟpaṭikku pākkāṟu veṟṟilai Irupattu
nālukkum nāḷoṉṟukkum nellu nāḻiyum san=timuṉṟukku
viḷakku Aiñcukkeṇṇai yāḻaākkukku nel Irunāḻiyum
pūcippānoruvaṉukku nellu Aiññāḻiyu meṟpaṭiyānuk
ku puṭavai mutal nellirukalane tūṇippatakkum Ik
koyilil Āṭavalār śrīkaraṇaviṭaṅkarkku san=tiyoṉṟukku
meṟpaṭi nivan=tameyākavum san=timuṉṟukku meṟpaṭi viḷak
kākavum tiruviḻāvukkut tirukkoṭiyot tirumuṇaikku tiru
viḻāt tirumuṇaikku ntirttattirumuṇaikkum Aṭikkiḻaṭṭavum
pākku veṟṟilaikkum sodagum pattukkum tirunantāviḷa
kku Eṇṇaikku ntiruvamutukkum Aṭikkiḻaṭṭa Aricikku mā
ka nel Irukalane tūṇi nānāḻiyuntiruk koṭippuṭavaiyu
ḷḷiṭṭa puṭavai Aiñcukku ntirukkoṭi Iṣapadevaṟku nāḷirupa
t toṉṟuk karicikkuṅ kalacattukkum bherikkundvajapaṭattuk
kuṅkiḻaṭṭavum yāgadevaṟku tiruvamutukkumāka nel nāṟkala
ne Irutūṇippatak kaṟunāḻiyuriyum gaṇapatiyār tiruviḻā
vukku tirumuḷaippuḻutikku tiruvamutukku tiruviḷakkeṇṇaik
kum Ativasakkiḻaṭṭavum puṭavai Aiñcukku nel nāṟka
lane Irutūṇimukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum homattukku nāḷ
Oṉṟukku neyyirunāḻi Urikku nelmukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi
yum homadravyattukku nel kuṟuṇiyuñcarup panniraṇṭu
kku nel mukkuṟuṇi yaṟunāḻiyum yāgatevaṟku tiruvamutuḷḷi
ṭṭu veṇṭuvataṟku nel kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi Uriya tiruviḻāvu
kku viḷakkoṉṟuk keṇṇai Uḻakkāka nāḷoṉṟukku vi
ḷakkaimpatuk keṇṇai kuṟuṇi nānāḻi Uriyuntiruvolak ka
ttukkum Aṇukka viḷakkukkum Eṇṇai Aiññāḻi Uriyumāka
eṇṇai patakkoru nāḻiyurikku nellirukalane patakkiru nā
ḻiyum Uṭaiyāṟkum vijaiyarājaviṭaṅkaṟku ntiruvamutarici
mukkuṟuṇikku nel Eḻukuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu ney
yamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukku nelpatakku mun nā
ḻiyumāka nel mukkalane Irutūṇippatakku nāḻi Uriyā
ka nāḷeḻukku nel Irupatteḻu kalane yorunāḻi Uriyum
Āṭavalār śrīkaraṇaviṭaṅkareḻuntaruḷi maṟṟaikkut tiruccānta
raiykku pon Araik kaḻañcukku nel Aiṅkalamu ntiruvamu
tarici mukkuṟuṇikku nel Eḻukuṟuṇi nānāḻiyuṅ kaṟiyamutu
neyyamutu tayiramu taṭaikkāyamutukku nel patakkoru nāḻi
yumāka nel Aiṅkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyu ntirtta
ttukkut tiruccuṇṇap poṭikku mañcaḷukku meṇṇaikku muṟṟa
cuṟṟappuṭavaikku maṭikkiḻaṭṭa nellukku ntirukāppu nāṇ mun
ṟukkup pon Iraṇṭu mañcāṭikku nelkalamumāka nel Irukala
nemukkuṟuṇiyu ntiruviḻāc cevikkavanta Aṭiyārkkum pariyaraka
ṟku nāḷonṟuk karici Irutūṇiyāka nāḷeḻuk karici nāṟkala
neyirutūṇikku nel patinoru kalane Irutūṇiyum dakṣa
ṇaikku
ppon
kaḻañcu
kkum dir
ttavāri
kkum U
ṭaiyā
r vaḻakka
ttukkum
puṭavai
Irupatu
kkum ne
l Irupati
n kalamum
tirukko
ṭi Iḻitta
maṟṟaikku
nel Irutū
ṇiyum Ip
paṭi celut
takkaṭavār
meṟpaṭiyār ci
vabrāhmaṇa
r bhāradvāja
kottirattu
cāmuṇṭan
paravittanu
m civacaraṇa
n paravitta
ṉu [iṣa]
bhadeva
n śrīmādha
vanum civa
kaṇṭanum
Ivvaṉai
varum I
varkaḷan
vayattā
rum Ippaṭi
yil muṭ
ṭil muṭṭi
raṭṭi cey
yakkaṭavar
kaḷākavum
I devarkku
vaitta nu
ntāviḷak
koṉṟinā
l cāvāmu
vāp perā
ṭu toṇ
ṇūṟṟāṟu
m kaikko
ṇṭivarka
ḷe celu
ttakkaṭava
rkaḷākavu
m Ippaṭi
ceyvittā
n ciṟuve
ḷūruṭaiyā
n śrīkaṇṭa
n Uruttira
murttiyā
na pūpāla ci
kāmaṇivi
ḻupparai
yaṉ Idha
nma maḻip
pān val
lavarai
yaṉ kuṟai
vu Itaḻi
kkil Iv
vūril kuṭi
yiruppān
vallava
raiyan ku
ṟaivu I
tu panmā
heśva
ra rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.541 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
